title: Doflamingo Tightens the Birdcage — Closing Beat
description: The shrinking Birdcage turns Dressrosa into a death trap while Doflamingo resets the rules of his game.
scene: On pages 19–20, Doflamingo, King Riku, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Trebol move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: As expected of our wondrous King!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...as long as I have ample time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I can perform emergency medical treat-ment upon myself...!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Right now, inside of my body... my "strings"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: are performing operations repairing and mending my organs.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's just how versatile my ability is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's not exactly regeneration or restoration...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Anyways... Congratulations on your suicide attack....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Now... allow me to end your life!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Carrying everything on his back...the curtain rises on the Fated final battle in

summary: This part focuses on doflamingo tightens the birdcage, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
